title: Spinning Into Global Wind Day
story: Wind turbines spin like giant pinwheels across the world on June 15 for Global Wind Day! This special day celebrates how wind power creates clean electricity without polluting our planet. People visit wind farms to see the massive white towers up close, while schools teach kids how moving air can light up entire cities. Many families make their own pinwheels and kites to feel the wind's power firsthand. Social media fills with photos of spinning turbines and flying kites as everyone celebrates this invisible force that's helping save our Earth one gust at a time.
activity_question: What do people make at home to feel wind power on Global Wind Day?
follow_up_question: What other ways could you use wind power in your daily life?
